🎨 Kickstart your summer vacations with Creativity, Colours & Fun at Konnectly's Art Mela! 🌈

🎨 All Art Supplies Provided
✦
🖼️ Choice of Canvas
✦

🌟 Why It's Different

Not Just Painting.
A Real Experience.

From tiny tot to confident teen — if your child loves colour, creativity, or just getting their hands messy, this is their day.

🪙
The Konnect Koins Economy
Shop · Bargain · Budget · Then Create
Every child gets Konnect Koins to spend at the Mela marketplace. They browse stalls, pick their art supplies, negotiate prices, manage their budget — and only then do they sit down to create. Art meets real-world thinking in the most fun way possible.
🖼️
Their Canvas, Their Call
Wooden cutouts · Tote bags · Caps · Canvas sheets
No two artworks at the Mela are the same, because no two kids are the same. Each child picks the canvas that speaks to them — their medium, their vision, their creation — entirely.
🤝
Real Friendships, Offline
Away from screens · Into something real
Side by side with neighbourhood kids, they'll collaborate, work in teams, laugh, get their hands messy, and form the kind of bonds that only come from shared real-world experiences.
✨
Live Art Exhibition
Every artwork displayed · Right there · On the day
When the brushes go down, the gallery goes up. Every single creation is displayed at the venue. Watch your child's face when the community stops to admire what they made.
✨ What's Included

Everything Your Child
Gets at the Mela

From the moment they walk in to the moment they walk out — every detail is taken care of.

🎨
All Art Supplies Provided
No running to the market before the event. All materials — paints, brushes, palettes — are available right at the Mela. Kids spend their Konnect Koins to pick exactly what they need.
🥤
Refreshments Included
Creating is hungry work! Refreshments are sorted — so kids stay energised and parents can relax while their young artist is in full creative flow.
🎰
Lucky Draw — ₹1 Lakh+ in Prizes
Every participant is in the lucky draw. With prizes worth over ₹1,00,000 up for grabs, someone's going home with a whole lot more than a painting.
🏆
Cash Prizes for Winners
Real rewards for real talent. Winners across each age group take home cash prizes — because every great young artist deserves to be celebrated in a big way.
📜
Certificates for Every Participant
Every child who participates goes home with an official Konnectly certificate — a proud keepsake they'll want to frame and show off forever.
🎁
Endless Gifts!
From goodie bags to brand vouchers — the Art Mela keeps on giving. Every child leaves with something special to remember the day by.
